formulas.name: Content
formulas.formula:
```json
[
  {
    "name": "Universal Set",
    "formula": "U = {all elements in the given set}",
    "variables": "U: Universal Set, {all elements in the given set}",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "The universal set is the set of all elements in the given problem or scenario."
  },
  {
    "name": "Empty Set",
    "formula": "{} = \emptyset",
    "variables": "{}: Empty Set, \emptyset: Set with no elements",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "The empty set is a set with no elements."
  },
  {
    "name": "Complement of a Set",
    "formula": "A' = {x|x∈U & x∉A}",
    "variables": "A': Complement of set A, U: Universal Set, x: element",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "The complement of a set A is the set of all elements in the universal set U that are not in A."
  },
  {
    "name": "Union of Two Sets",
    "formula": "A ∪ B = {x|x∈A or x∈B}",
    "variables": "A ∪ B: Union of sets A and B, x: element",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "The union of two sets A and B is the set of all elements in A or B or both."
  },
  {
    "name": "Intersection of Two Sets",
    "formula": "A ∩ B = {x|x∈A and x∈B}",
    "variables": "A ∩ B: Intersection of sets A and B, x: element",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "The intersection of two sets A and B is the set of all elements in both A and B."
  },
  {
    "name": "Difference of Two Sets",
    "formula": "A - B = {x|x∈A and x∉B}",
    "variables": "A - B: Difference of sets A and B, x: element",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "The difference of two sets A and B is the set of all elements in A but not in B."
  },
  {
    "name": "Symmetric Difference of Two Sets",
    "formula": "A △ B = (A ∪ B) - (A ∩ B)",
    "variables": "A △ B: Symmetric Difference of sets A and B, A ∪ B: Union of sets A and B, A ∩ B: Intersection of sets A and B",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "The symmetric difference of two sets A and B is the set of all elements in A or B but not in both."
  },
  {
    "name": "Cartesian Product of Two Sets",
    "formula": "A × B = {(a, b)|a∈A and b∈B}",
    "variables": "A × B: Cartesian Product of sets A and B, a and b: elements",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "The Cartesian product of two sets A and B is the set of all ordered pairs (a, b) where a is an element of A and b is an element of B."
  },
  {
    "name": "Power Set of a Set",
    "formula": "P(A) = {X|X⊆A}",
    "variables": "P(A): Power Set of set A, X: subset of A",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "The power set of a set A is the set of all subsets of A."
  },
  {
    "name": "Nand Operator",
    "formula": "A ∧ B = ¬(A ∨ B)",
    "variables": "A ∧ B: Nand operator, A and B: elements, ¬: Not operator, ∨: Or operator",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "The nand operator is the negation of the disjunction of two elements."
  },
  {
    "name": "NOR Operator",
    "formula": "A ∨ B = ¬(A ∧ B)",
    "variables": "A ∨ B: NOR operator, A and B: elements, ¬: Not operator, ∧: And operator",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "The nor operator is the negation of the conjunction of two elements."
  },
  {
    "name": "Borel-Hume Algebra",
    "formula": "A ∪ B = A + B, A ∩ B = A ∩ B, A' = A'",
    "variables": "A ∪ B: Union of sets A and B, A ∩ B: Intersection of sets A and B, A': Complement of set A",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "The Borel-Hume algebra is a set of axioms that define the basic operations of set theory."
  }
]
```

Note that some of these formulas may be presented in different ways in different textbooks or resources. I have tried to provide a standard and widely accepted representation of these formulas.
